papers.notes: Short-answer questions based on Core curriculum
Short-answer questions based on Extended curriculum
Structured questions based on Core curriculum
Structured questions based on Extended curriculum

contentTiers.extended: For candidates targeting grades D-A* (includes all Core content)

topics.description: Types of number, sets, fractions, decimals, percentages, calculations, approximation, standard form, upper and lower bounds, ratio, proportion, rate, time, money, finance
subtopics: Types of number: natural, integers, prime, square, cube, common factors/multiples, rational, irrational, reciprocals
Fractions, decimals, percentages: conversions, ordering, calculations
Calculations: order of operations, use of calculator
Approximation and estimation: rounding, significant figures, decimal places
Time, money and finance: profit/loss, simple and compound interest (Extended)

topics.description: Algebraic expressions, manipulation, equations, formulae, sequences, graphs of functions
subtopics: Laws of indices (including negative and fractional indices for Extended)
Simultaneous linear equations (Extended: algebraic and graphical)
Sequences: nth term, arithmetic and geometric (Extended)
Graphs of functions: linear, quadratic, cubic, reciprocal (Extended)

topics.description: Coordinates, gradient, equation of straight line, parallel and perpendicular lines
subtopics: Gradient of linear graphs (from grid for Core)
Equation of straight line: y = mx + c (Extended)
Mid-point and length of a line segment (Extended)

topics.description: Geometrical terms, constructions, scale drawings, similarity, symmetry, angles, circle theorems
subtopics: Geometrical terms: point, line, parallel, perpendicular, bearing, angles
Triangles, special quadrilaterals, polygons, nets, simple solids
Circle terms: centre, radius, diameter, circumference, chord, tangent, arc, sector, segment
Angles: angles at point, on straight line, vertically opposite, parallel lines, triangles, quadrilaterals
Circle theorems (Extended): angle in semicircle, tangent-radius, angles in same segment, cyclic quadrilateral, alternate segment

topics.description: Units of measure, perimeter, area, circumference, surface area, volume
subtopics: Metric units of mass, length, area, volume, capacity
Perimeter and area: rectangle, triangle, parallelogram, trapezium
Surface area and volume: cuboid, prism, cylinder, sphere, pyramid, cone (Extended)
Problems involving surface area and volume

topics.description: Pythagoras theorem, trigonometric ratios, sine/cosine rules, area of triangle, 3D trigonometry (Extended)
subtopics: Trigonometric ratios: sin, cos, tan for right-angled triangles

topics.description: Vectors, transformations: reflection, rotation, translation, enlargement
Probability concepts, combined events, tree diagrams, conditional probability (Extended)
Data collection, presentation, analysis: averages, spread, cumulative frequency
subtopics: Data collection and types of data
Averages: mean, median, mode for raw and grouped data
